title: North American Anime, Manga Releases, April 19-25
content: Anime Releases Print Manga Releases Digital Manga Releases Digital Novel Releases Audiobooks
author: ANN

title: Crunchyroll’s Darkest Spring 2026 Anime Reveals Its True Story (And It’s the Perfect Dark Fantasy of the Year So Far)
content: There are many anime currently airing in Spring 2026 on Crunchyroll ; however, not every series is emerging as a dark story. Among them, one particularly dark series has stood out as the perfect dark power fantasy with its latest episode, setting the course for an exciting narrative.
author: ComicBook

title: Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves Game Streams New Animated Video for Wolfgang Krauser
content: SNK revealed a new animated trailer for its Fatal Fury City of the Wolves fighting game , highlighting the DLC character Wolfgang Krauser for his launch on Friday. Masami Ōbari , who previously directed an animated trailer for the game's Street Fighter collaboration, directed the new video and was also the…
author: ANN

title: One of Anime’s Biggest Mech Series is About to be Free to Watch
content: When anime fans talk about mechs, the conversation will normally drift toward Mobile Suit Gundam , the franchise that has been a part of the landscape since the 1970s. However, the anime that first introduced viewers to the Earth Federation and the Principality of Zeon is far from the only story introduced in the…
author: ComicBook

title: 8 Years Later, Acclaimed Action Series Confirms Its Highly Anticipated Return
content: The acclaimed action drama manga, Gangsta. , written and illustrated by Kohsuke, is finally returning after an indefinite hiatus. The manga began serialization in Shinchosha’s Comic@Bunch magazine in 2011.
author: ComicBook

title: Godzilla: Upcoming Event Might Hint at The MonsterVerse’s Next Villain
content: When it comes to Godzilla , it feels like there is an arms race between the East and the West when it comes to the King of the Monsters. While America has multiple movies and a television series focusing on Legendary’s MonsterVerse, Toho is preparing to dive into “Godzilla World,” a new cinematic universe that will…
author: ComicBook

title: Final Fantasy XIV MMORPG Unveils New 'Evercold' Expansion for January 2027
content: Square Enix announced on Friday at the Final Fantasy XIV Fan Festival 2026 in Anaheim event the next expansion for Square Enix 's Final Fantasy XIV MMORPG, which is titled "Evercold" and will launch in January 2027.
author: ANN

title: K Manga Adds Dig It Volleyball Manga
content: Kodansha 's K MANGA platform announced on Thursday that it has added Yoshidamaru 's DIG IT volleyball manga in English as a simulpub title. K MANGA describes the story: Gaku is the son of former Japanese national volleyball star Kei Shishiya.
author: ANN

title: Netfix’s Shonen Anime Hits Major Manga Milestone
content: When it comes to anime, Netflix has been working to carve out a place for the streaming service in the ever-growing medium. While housing plenty of classic franchises such as Jujutsu Kaisen, Death Note, Attack on Titan , and more, the platform has created plenty of original anime of its own.
author: ComicBook

title: Disgaea Mayhem Spinoff Game's Trailer Reveals July 23 Release in West
content: NIS America announced on Friday that it will release Nippon Ichi Software 's Disgaea Mayhem ( Kyо̄ran Makaism ) game in the West as a spinoff in its Disgaea franchise for Nintendo Switch 2, Nintendo Switch, PlayStation 5, and PC via Steam on July 23.
author: ANN
